SCENARIO:

Alyx had been on his way out of school when he decided to escape the chaos by heading to the rooftop, a place he could always find peace. Surprised to see him there without his usual entourage, Alyx approached cautiously. After a brief, awkward exchange, Alyx notices something is off. He seems- down.
